title: Heroic Biome Compass
description: Craft a special compass to track any biome with a price
body:
![main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/518d47dc4fa0b1dc28b4351fe654bdb55f095205.png)

# **Biome Tracker Compass Plugin**

This plugin adds a Biome Tracker Compass to your server! Players can craft this compass, and when they right-click, it will point to any biome listed in the config.yml. You can easily customize which biomes can be tracked and set the prices for crafting the compass in the config.yml.

![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d04eff4e2f3bef71674e4e40373eac7790758223.jpeg)
Craft a Biome Tracker Compass to track specific biomes.
Configurable prices for crafting the compass.
Configurable Biomes add any biome to the menu
Works with Minecraft versions 1.18 - 1.21.4.
Custom biomes are not supported.


![commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d61310e6da2fee65c018068a995a8706c94e55f0.jpeg)
- /biomecompass
- /biomecompass reload

![permissions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5698b4940548a0e57668bdfab2597d5ffb200283.jpeg)
biomecompass.use
biomecompass.reload


## **Plugin Requirements:**
- Vault
